description_long: This is a tall, open shelving unit featuring four wooden shelves supported by a slender black metal frame. The frame is reinforced with diagonal crossbars at the back, providing both structural stability and a modern industrial aesthetic. Each shelf is rectangular and evenly spaced, offering ample storage or display space for books, decor, or other items. The sides of the unit are open, with only the thin metal supports running vertically, giving it a lightweight and airy appearance. The top of the frame is slightly raised, forming a shallow rail around the uppermost shelf. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public spaces.
description: A tall, open shelving unit with four wooden shelves and a black metal frame featuring crossbar supports. Its minimalist, industrial design is both functional and visually light.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four wooden shelves, the black metal frame, and the X-shaped crossbars at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the shelving unit and the depth of the wooden shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full X-shaped metal crossbars and the open structure of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim side profile and shelf arrangement.
